recordId.title: Record ID
recordId.description: The unique ID of the parent record from which the email will be retrieved.

emailCount.title: Email Count
emailCount.description: The number of records retrieved and stored in the emailCollection variable.

startDate.title: Start Date
startDate.description: The first date in the date range from which to retrieve emails.

endDate.title: End Date
endDate.description: The last date in the date range from which to retrieve emails.
